'''Kandah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ansionian]] who was one of the seven delegates of the [[Unity Council]] on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. She had a clouded brown eye and long vertical face-lines. She opposed the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Her family owned estates in [[Korumdah]]. In the end, she was one of two delegates to vote against Ansion remaining in the Republic.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
